69typedef enum
70{
71/****** Cortex-M0 Processor Exceptions Numbers ******************************************************/
72 NonMaskableInt_IRQn = -14,
73 HardFault_IRQn = -13,
74 SVCall_IRQn = -5,
75 PendSV_IRQn = -2,
76 SysTick_IRQn = -1,
77
78/****** STM32L-0 specific Interrupt Numbers *********************************************************/
79 WWDG_IRQn = 0,
80 PVD_IRQn = 1,
81 RTC_IRQn = 2,
82 FLASH_IRQn = 3,
83 RCC_CRS_IRQn = 4,
84 EXTI0_1_IRQn = 5,
85 EXTI2_3_IRQn = 6,
86 EXTI4_15_IRQn = 7,
87 TSC_IRQn = 8,
88 DMA1_Channel1_IRQn = 9,
89 DMA1_Channel2_3_IRQn = 10,
90 DMA1_Channel4_5_6_7_IRQn = 11,
91 ADC1_COMP_IRQn = 12,
92 LPTIM1_IRQn = 13,
93 USART4_5_IRQn = 14,
94 TIM2_IRQn = 15,
95 TIM3_IRQn = 16,
96 TIM6_DAC_IRQn = 17,
97 TIM7_IRQn = 18,
98 TIM21_IRQn = 20,
99 I2C3_IRQn = 21,
100 TIM22_IRQn = 22,
101 I2C1_IRQn = 23,
102 I2C2_IRQn = 24,
103 SPI1_IRQn = 25,
104 SPI2_IRQn = 26,
105 USART1_IRQn = 27,
106 USART2_IRQn = 28,
107 RNG_LPUART1_IRQn = 29,
108 LCD_IRQn = 30,
109 USB_IRQn = 31,
110} IRQn_Type;

797/******************************************************************************/
798/* Peripheral Registers Bits Definition */
799/******************************************************************************/
800/******************************************************************************/
801/* */
802/* Analog to Digital Converter (ADC) */
803/* */
804/******************************************************************************/
805/******************** Bits definition for ADC_ISR register ******************/
806#define ADC_ISR_EOCAL_Pos (11U)
807#define ADC_ISR_EOCAL_Msk (0x1UL << ADC_ISR_EOCAL_Pos)
808#define ADC_ISR_EOCAL ADC_ISR_EOCAL_Msk
809#define ADC_ISR_AWD_Pos (7U)
810#define ADC_ISR_AWD_Msk (0x1UL << ADC_ISR_AWD_Pos)
811#define ADC_ISR_AWD ADC_ISR_AWD_Msk
812#define ADC_ISR_OVR_Pos (4U)
813#define ADC_ISR_OVR_Msk (0x1UL << ADC_ISR_OVR_Pos)
814#define ADC_ISR_OVR ADC_ISR_OVR_Msk
815#define ADC_ISR_EOSEQ_Pos (3U)
816#define ADC_ISR_EOSEQ_Msk (0x1UL << ADC_ISR_EOSEQ_Pos)
817#define ADC_ISR_EOSEQ ADC_ISR_EOSEQ_Msk
818#define ADC_ISR_EOC_Pos (2U)
819#define ADC_ISR_EOC_Msk (0x1UL << ADC_ISR_EOC_Pos)
820#define ADC_ISR_EOC ADC_ISR_EOC_Msk
821#define ADC_ISR_EOSMP_Pos (1U)
822#define ADC_ISR_EOSMP_Msk (0x1UL << ADC_ISR_EOSMP_Pos)
823#define ADC_ISR_EOSMP ADC_ISR_EOSMP_Msk
824#define ADC_ISR_ADRDY_Pos (0U)
825#define ADC_ISR_ADRDY_Msk (0x1UL << ADC_ISR_ADRDY_Pos)
826#define ADC_ISR_ADRDY ADC_ISR_ADRDY_Msk
827
828/* Old EOSEQ bit definition, maintained for legacy purpose */
829#define ADC_ISR_EOS ADC_ISR_EOSEQ

1081/******************************************************************************/
1082/* */
1083/* Analog Comparators (COMP) */
1084/* */
1085/******************************************************************************/
1086/************* Bit definition for COMP_CSR register (COMP1 and COMP2) **************/
1087/* COMP1 bits definition */
1088#define COMP_CSR_COMP1EN_Pos (0U)
1089#define COMP_CSR_COMP1EN_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1EN_Pos)
1090#define COMP_CSR_COMP1EN COMP_CSR_COMP1EN_Msk
1091#define COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_Pos (4U)
1092#define COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_Msk (0x3UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_Pos)
1093#define COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_Msk
1094#define COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_0 (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_Pos)
1095#define COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_1 (0x2UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1INNSEL_Pos)
1096#define COMP_CSR_COMP1WM_Pos (8U)
1097#define COMP_CSR_COMP1WM_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1WM_Pos)
1098#define COMP_CSR_COMP1WM COMP_CSR_COMP1WM_Msk
1099#define COMP_CSR_COMP1LPTIM1IN1_Pos (12U)
1100#define COMP_CSR_COMP1LPTIM1IN1_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1LPTIM1IN1_Pos)
1101#define COMP_CSR_COMP1LPTIM1IN1 COMP_CSR_COMP1LPTIM1IN1_Msk
1102#define COMP_CSR_COMP1POLARITY_Pos (15U)
1103#define COMP_CSR_COMP1POLARITY_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1POLARITY_Pos)
1104#define COMP_CSR_COMP1POLARITY COMP_CSR_COMP1POLARITY_Msk
1105#define COMP_CSR_COMP1VALUE_Pos (30U)
1106#define COMP_CSR_COMP1VALUE_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1VALUE_Pos)
1107#define COMP_CSR_COMP1VALUE COMP_CSR_COMP1VALUE_Msk
1108#define COMP_CSR_COMP1LOCK_Pos (31U)
1109#define COMP_CSR_COMP1LOCK_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP1LOCK_Pos)
1110#define COMP_CSR_COMP1LOCK COMP_CSR_COMP1LOCK_Msk
1111/* COMP2 bits definition */
1112#define COMP_CSR_COMP2EN_Pos (0U)
1113#define COMP_CSR_COMP2EN_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2EN_Pos)
1114#define COMP_CSR_COMP2EN COMP_CSR_COMP2EN_Msk
1115#define COMP_CSR_COMP2SPEED_Pos (3U)
1116#define COMP_CSR_COMP2SPEED_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2SPEED_Pos)
1117#define COMP_CSR_COMP2SPEED COMP_CSR_COMP2SPEED_Msk
1118#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_Pos (4U)
1119#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_Msk (0x7UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_Pos)
1120#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_Msk
1121#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_0 (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_Pos)
1122#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_1 (0x2UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_Pos)
1123#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_2 (0x4UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INNSEL_Pos)
1124#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_Pos (8U)
1125#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_Msk (0x7UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_Pos)
1126#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_Msk
1127#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_0 (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_Pos)
1128#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_1 (0x2UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_Pos)
1129#define COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_2 (0x4UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2INPSEL_Pos)
1130#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN2_Pos (12U)
1131#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN2_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN2_Pos)
1132#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN2 COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN2_Msk
1133#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN1_Pos (13U)
1134#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN1_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN1_Pos)
1135#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN1 COMP_CSR_COMP2LPTIM1IN1_Msk
1136#define COMP_CSR_COMP2POLARITY_Pos (15U)
1137#define COMP_CSR_COMP2POLARITY_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2POLARITY_Pos)
1138#define COMP_CSR_COMP2POLARITY COMP_CSR_COMP2POLARITY_Msk
1139#define COMP_CSR_COMP2VALUE_Pos (30U)
1140#define COMP_CSR_COMP2VALUE_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2VALUE_Pos)
1141#define COMP_CSR_COMP2VALUE COMP_CSR_COMP2VALUE_Msk
1142#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LOCK_Pos (31U)
1143#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LOCK_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMP2LOCK_Pos)
1144#define COMP_CSR_COMP2LOCK COMP_CSR_COMP2LOCK_Msk
1145
1146/********************** Bit definition for COMP_CSR register common ****************/
1147#define COMP_CSR_COMPxEN_Pos (0U)
1148#define COMP_CSR_COMPxEN_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMPxEN_Pos)
1149#define COMP_CSR_COMPxEN COMP_CSR_COMPxEN_Msk
1150#define COMP_CSR_COMPxPOLARITY_Pos (15U)
1151#define COMP_CSR_COMPxPOLARITY_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMPxPOLARITY_Pos)
1152#define COMP_CSR_COMPxPOLARITY COMP_CSR_COMPxPOLARITY_Msk
1153#define COMP_CSR_COMPxOUTVALUE_Pos (30U)
1154#define COMP_CSR_COMPxOUTVALUE_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMPxOUTVALUE_Pos)
1155#define COMP_CSR_COMPxOUTVALUE COMP_CSR_COMPxOUTVALUE_Msk
1156#define COMP_CSR_COMPxLOCK_Pos (31U)
1157#define COMP_CSR_COMPxLOCK_Msk (0x1UL << COMP_CSR_COMPxLOCK_Pos)
1158#define COMP_CSR_COMPxLOCK COMP_CSR_COMPxLOCK_Msk
1159
1160/* Reference defines */
1161#define COMP_CSR_WINMODE COMP_CSR_COMP1WM
1162
1163/******************************************************************************/
1164/* */
1165/* CRC calculation unit (CRC) */
1166/* */
1167/******************************************************************************/
1168/******************* Bit definition for CRC_DR register *********************/
1169#define CRC_DR_DR_Pos (0U)
1170#define CRC_DR_DR_Msk (0xFFFFFFFFUL << CRC_DR_DR_Pos)
1171#define CRC_DR_DR CRC_DR_DR_Msk
1172
1173/******************* Bit definition for CRC_IDR register ********************/
1174#define CRC_IDR_IDR (0xFFU)
1175
1176/******************** Bit definition for CRC_CR register ********************/
1177#define CRC_CR_RESET_Pos (0U)
1178#define CRC_CR_RESET_Msk (0x1UL << CRC_CR_RESET_Pos)
1179#define CRC_CR_RESET CRC_CR_RESET_Msk
1180#define CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_Pos (3U)
1181#define CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_Msk (0x3UL << CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_Pos)
1182#define CRC_CR_POLYSIZE CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_Msk
1183#define CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_0 (0x1UL << CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_Pos)
1184#define CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_1 (0x2UL << CRC_CR_POLYSIZE_Pos)
1185#define CRC_CR_REV_IN_Pos (5U)
1186#define CRC_CR_REV_IN_Msk (0x3UL << CRC_CR_REV_IN_Pos)
1187#define CRC_CR_REV_IN CRC_CR_REV_IN_Msk
1188#define CRC_CR_REV_IN_0 (0x1UL << CRC_CR_REV_IN_Pos)
1189#define CRC_CR_REV_IN_1 (0x2UL << CRC_CR_REV_IN_Pos)
1190#define CRC_CR_REV_OUT_Pos (7U)
1191#define CRC_CR_REV_OUT_Msk (0x1UL << CRC_CR_REV_OUT_Pos)
1192#define CRC_CR_REV_OUT CRC_CR_REV_OUT_Msk
1193
1194/******************* Bit definition for CRC_INIT register *******************/
1195#define CRC_INIT_INIT_Pos (0U)
1196#define CRC_INIT_INIT_Msk (0xFFFFFFFFUL << CRC_INIT_INIT_Pos)
1197#define CRC_INIT_INIT CRC_INIT_INIT_Msk
1198
1199/******************* Bit definition for CRC_POL register ********************/
1200#define CRC_POL_POL_Pos (0U)
1201#define CRC_POL_POL_Msk (0xFFFFFFFFUL << CRC_POL_POL_Pos)
1202#define CRC_POL_POL CRC_POL_POL_Msk
1203
1204/******************************************************************************/
1205/* */
1206/* CRS Clock Recovery System */
1207/* */
1208/******************************************************************************/
1209
1210/******************* Bit definition for CRS_CR register *********************/
1211#define CRS_CR_SYNCOKIE_Pos (0U)
1212#define CRS_CR_SYNCOKIE_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CR_SYNCOKIE_Pos)
1213#define CRS_CR_SYNCOKIE CRS_CR_SYNCOKIE_Msk /* SYNC event OK interrupt enable */
1214#define CRS_CR_SYNCWARNIE_Pos (1U)
1215#define CRS_CR_SYNCWARNIE_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CR_SYNCWARNIE_Pos)
1216#define CRS_CR_SYNCWARNIE CRS_CR_SYNCWARNIE_Msk /* SYNC warning interrupt enable */
1217#define CRS_CR_ERRIE_Pos (2U)
1218#define CRS_CR_ERRIE_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CR_ERRIE_Pos)
1219#define CRS_CR_ERRIE CRS_CR_ERRIE_Msk /* SYNC error interrupt enable */
1220#define CRS_CR_ESYNCIE_Pos (3U)
1221#define CRS_CR_ESYNCIE_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CR_ESYNCIE_Pos)
1222#define CRS_CR_ESYNCIE CRS_CR_ESYNCIE_Msk /* Expected SYNC(ESYNCF) interrupt Enable*/
1223#define CRS_CR_CEN_Pos (5U)
1224#define CRS_CR_CEN_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CR_CEN_Pos)
1225#define CRS_CR_CEN CRS_CR_CEN_Msk /* Frequency error counter enable */
1226#define CRS_CR_AUTOTRIMEN_Pos (6U)
1227#define CRS_CR_AUTOTRIMEN_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CR_AUTOTRIMEN_Pos)
1228#define CRS_CR_AUTOTRIMEN CRS_CR_AUTOTRIMEN_Msk /* Automatic trimming enable */
1229#define CRS_CR_SWSYNC_Pos (7U)
1230#define CRS_CR_SWSYNC_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CR_SWSYNC_Pos)
1231#define CRS_CR_SWSYNC CRS_CR_SWSYNC_Msk /* A Software SYNC event is generated */
1232#define CRS_CR_TRIM_Pos (8U)
1233#define CRS_CR_TRIM_Msk (0x3FUL << CRS_CR_TRIM_Pos)
1234#define CRS_CR_TRIM CRS_CR_TRIM_Msk /* HSI48 oscillator smooth trimming */
1235
1236/******************* Bit definition for CRS_CFGR register *********************/
1237#define CRS_CFGR_RELOAD_Pos (0U)
1238#define CRS_CFGR_RELOAD_Msk (0xFFFFUL << CRS_CFGR_RELOAD_Pos)
1239#define CRS_CFGR_RELOAD CRS_CFGR_RELOAD_Msk /* Counter reload value */
1240#define CRS_CFGR_FELIM_Pos (16U)
1241#define CRS_CFGR_FELIM_Msk (0xFFUL << CRS_CFGR_FELIM_Pos)
1242#define CRS_CFGR_FELIM CRS_CFGR_FELIM_Msk /* Frequency error limit */
1243
1244#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_Pos (24U)
1245#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_Msk (0x7UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_Pos)
1246#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_Msk /* SYNC divider */
1247#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_0 (0x1UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_Pos)
1248#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_1 (0x2UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_Pos)
1249#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_2 (0x4UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCDIV_Pos)
1250
1251#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_Pos (28U)
1252#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_Msk (0x3UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_Pos)
1253#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_Msk /* SYNC signal source selection */
1254#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_0 (0x1UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_Pos)
1255#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_1 (0x2UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCSRC_Pos)
1256
1257#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCPOL_Pos (31U)
1258#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCPOL_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_CFGR_SYNCPOL_Pos)
1259#define CRS_CFGR_SYNCPOL CRS_CFGR_SYNCPOL_Msk /* SYNC polarity selection */
1260
1261/******************* Bit definition for CRS_ISR register *********************/
1262#define CRS_ISR_SYNCOKF_Pos (0U)
1263#define CRS_ISR_SYNCOKF_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_SYNCOKF_Pos)
1264#define CRS_ISR_SYNCOKF CRS_ISR_SYNCOKF_Msk /* SYNC event OK flag */
1265#define CRS_ISR_SYNCWARNF_Pos (1U)
1266#define CRS_ISR_SYNCWARNF_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_SYNCWARNF_Pos)
1267#define CRS_ISR_SYNCWARNF CRS_ISR_SYNCWARNF_Msk /* SYNC warning */
1268#define CRS_ISR_ERRF_Pos (2U)
1269#define CRS_ISR_ERRF_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_ERRF_Pos)
1270#define CRS_ISR_ERRF CRS_ISR_ERRF_Msk /* SYNC error flag */
1271#define CRS_ISR_ESYNCF_Pos (3U)
1272#define CRS_ISR_ESYNCF_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_ESYNCF_Pos)
1273#define CRS_ISR_ESYNCF CRS_ISR_ESYNCF_Msk /* Expected SYNC flag */
1274#define CRS_ISR_SYNCERR_Pos (8U)
1275#define CRS_ISR_SYNCERR_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_SYNCERR_Pos)
1276#define CRS_ISR_SYNCERR CRS_ISR_SYNCERR_Msk /* SYNC error */
1277#define CRS_ISR_SYNCMISS_Pos (9U)
1278#define CRS_ISR_SYNCMISS_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_SYNCMISS_Pos)
1279#define CRS_ISR_SYNCMISS CRS_ISR_SYNCMISS_Msk /* SYNC missed */
1280#define CRS_ISR_TRIMOVF_Pos (10U)
1281#define CRS_ISR_TRIMOVF_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_TRIMOVF_Pos)
1282#define CRS_ISR_TRIMOVF CRS_ISR_TRIMOVF_Msk /* Trimming overflow or underflow */
1283#define CRS_ISR_FEDIR_Pos (15U)
1284#define CRS_ISR_FEDIR_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ISR_FEDIR_Pos)
1285#define CRS_ISR_FEDIR CRS_ISR_FEDIR_Msk /* Frequency error direction */
1286#define CRS_ISR_FECAP_Pos (16U)
1287#define CRS_ISR_FECAP_Msk (0xFFFFUL << CRS_ISR_FECAP_Pos)
1288#define CRS_ISR_FECAP CRS_ISR_FECAP_Msk /* Frequency error capture */
1289
1290/******************* Bit definition for CRS_ICR register *********************/
1291#define CRS_ICR_SYNCOKC_Pos (0U)
1292#define CRS_ICR_SYNCOKC_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ICR_SYNCOKC_Pos)
1293#define CRS_ICR_SYNCOKC CRS_ICR_SYNCOKC_Msk /* SYNC event OK clear flag */
1294#define CRS_ICR_SYNCWARNC_Pos (1U)
1295#define CRS_ICR_SYNCWARNC_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ICR_SYNCWARNC_Pos)
1296#define CRS_ICR_SYNCWARNC CRS_ICR_SYNCWARNC_Msk /* SYNC warning clear flag */
1297#define CRS_ICR_ERRC_Pos (2U)
1298#define CRS_ICR_ERRC_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ICR_ERRC_Pos)
1299#define CRS_ICR_ERRC CRS_ICR_ERRC_Msk /* Error clear flag */
1300#define CRS_ICR_ESYNCC_Pos (3U)
1301#define CRS_ICR_ESYNCC_Msk (0x1UL << CRS_ICR_ESYNCC_Pos)
1302#define CRS_ICR_ESYNCC CRS_ICR_ESYNCC_Msk /* Expected SYNC clear flag */
1303
1304/******************************************************************************/
1305/* */
1306/* Digital to Analog Converter (DAC) */
1307/* */
1308/******************************************************************************/
1309
1310/*
1311 * @brief Specific device feature definitions (not present on all devices in the STM32L0 family)
1312 */
1313#define DAC_CHANNEL2_SUPPORT
1314
1315/******************** Bit definition for DAC_CR register ********************/
1316#define DAC_CR_EN1_Pos (0U)
1317#define DAC_CR_EN1_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_EN1_Pos)
1318#define DAC_CR_EN1 DAC_CR_EN1_Msk
1319#define DAC_CR_BOFF1_Pos (1U)
1320#define DAC_CR_BOFF1_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_BOFF1_Pos)
1321#define DAC_CR_BOFF1 DAC_CR_BOFF1_Msk
1322#define DAC_CR_TEN1_Pos (2U)
1323#define DAC_CR_TEN1_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_TEN1_Pos)
1324#define DAC_CR_TEN1 DAC_CR_TEN1_Msk
1325
1326#define DAC_CR_TSEL1_Pos (3U)
1327#define DAC_CR_TSEL1_Msk (0x7UL << DAC_CR_TSEL1_Pos)
1328#define DAC_CR_TSEL1 DAC_CR_TSEL1_Msk
1329#define DAC_CR_TSEL1_0 (0x1UL << DAC_CR_TSEL1_Pos)
1330#define DAC_CR_TSEL1_1 (0x2UL << DAC_CR_TSEL1_Pos)
1331#define DAC_CR_TSEL1_2 (0x4UL << DAC_CR_TSEL1_Pos)
1332
1333#define DAC_CR_WAVE1_Pos (6U)
1334#define DAC_CR_WAVE1_Msk (0x3UL << DAC_CR_WAVE1_Pos)
1335#define DAC_CR_WAVE1 DAC_CR_WAVE1_Msk
1336#define DAC_CR_WAVE1_0 (0x1UL << DAC_CR_WAVE1_Pos)
1337#define DAC_CR_WAVE1_1 (0x2UL << DAC_CR_WAVE1_Pos)
1338
1339#define DAC_CR_MAMP1_Pos (8U)
1340#define DAC_CR_MAMP1_Msk (0xFUL << DAC_CR_MAMP1_Pos)
1341#define DAC_CR_MAMP1 DAC_CR_MAMP1_Msk
1342#define DAC_CR_MAMP1_0 (0x1UL << DAC_CR_MAMP1_Pos)
1343#define DAC_CR_MAMP1_1 (0x2UL << DAC_CR_MAMP1_Pos)
1344#define DAC_CR_MAMP1_2 (0x4UL << DAC_CR_MAMP1_Pos)
1345#define DAC_CR_MAMP1_3 (0x8UL << DAC_CR_MAMP1_Pos)
1346
1347#define DAC_CR_DMAEN1_Pos (12U)
1348#define DAC_CR_DMAEN1_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_DMAEN1_Pos)
1349#define DAC_CR_DMAEN1 DAC_CR_DMAEN1_Msk
1350#define DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE1_Pos (13U)
1351#define DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE1_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE1_Pos)
1352#define DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE1 DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE1_Msk
1353
1354#define DAC_CR_EN2_Pos (16U)
1355#define DAC_CR_EN2_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_EN2_Pos)
1356#define DAC_CR_EN2 DAC_CR_EN2_Msk
1357#define DAC_CR_BOFF2_Pos (17U)
1358#define DAC_CR_BOFF2_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_BOFF2_Pos)
1359#define DAC_CR_BOFF2 DAC_CR_BOFF2_Msk
1360#define DAC_CR_TEN2_Pos (18U)
1361#define DAC_CR_TEN2_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_TEN2_Pos)
1362#define DAC_CR_TEN2 DAC_CR_TEN2_Msk
1363
1364#define DAC_CR_TSEL2_Pos (19U)
1365#define DAC_CR_TSEL2_Msk (0x7UL << DAC_CR_TSEL2_Pos)
1366#define DAC_CR_TSEL2 DAC_CR_TSEL2_Msk
1367#define DAC_CR_TSEL2_0 (0x1UL << DAC_CR_TSEL2_Pos)
1368#define DAC_CR_TSEL2_1 (0x2UL << DAC_CR_TSEL2_Pos)
1369#define DAC_CR_TSEL2_2 (0x4UL << DAC_CR_TSEL2_Pos)
1370
1371#define DAC_CR_WAVE2_Pos (22U)
1372#define DAC_CR_WAVE2_Msk (0x3UL << DAC_CR_WAVE2_Pos)
1373#define DAC_CR_WAVE2 DAC_CR_WAVE2_Msk
1374#define DAC_CR_WAVE2_0 (0x1UL << DAC_CR_WAVE2_Pos)
1375#define DAC_CR_WAVE2_1 (0x2UL << DAC_CR_WAVE2_Pos)
1376
1377#define DAC_CR_MAMP2_Pos (24U)
1378#define DAC_CR_MAMP2_Msk (0xFUL << DAC_CR_MAMP2_Pos)
1379#define DAC_CR_MAMP2 DAC_CR_MAMP2_Msk
1380#define DAC_CR_MAMP2_0 (0x1UL << DAC_CR_MAMP2_Pos)
1381#define DAC_CR_MAMP2_1 (0x2UL << DAC_CR_MAMP2_Pos)
1382#define DAC_CR_MAMP2_2 (0x4UL << DAC_CR_MAMP2_Pos)
1383#define DAC_CR_MAMP2_3 (0x8UL << DAC_CR_MAMP2_Pos)
1384
1385#define DAC_CR_DMAEN2_Pos (28U)
1386#define DAC_CR_DMAEN2_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_DMAEN2_Pos)
1387#define DAC_CR_DMAEN2 DAC_CR_DMAEN2_Msk
1388#define DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE2_Pos (29U)
1389#define DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE2_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE2_Pos)
1390#define DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE2 DAC_CR_DMAUDRIE2_Msk
1391

1393#define DAC_SWTRIGR_SWTRIG1_Pos (0U)
1394#define DAC_SWTRIGR_SWTRIG1_Msk (0x1UL << DAC_SWTRIGR_SWTRIG1_Pos)
1395#define DAC_SWTRIGR_SWTRIG1 DAC_SWTRIGR_SWTRIG1_Msk

1399

1407#define DAC_DHR12L1_DACC1DHR_Msk (0xFFFUL << DAC_DHR12L1_DACC1DHR_Pos)

1472/******************************************************************************/
1473/* */
1474/* Debug MCU (DBGMCU) */
1475/* */
1476/******************************************************************************/
1477
1478/**************** Bit definition for DBGMCU_IDCODE register *****************/

1480#define DBGMCU_IDCODE_DEV_ID_Msk (0xFFFUL << DBGMCU_IDCODE_DEV_ID_Pos)
1481#define DBGMCU_IDCODE_DEV_ID DBGMCU_IDCODE_DEV_ID_Msk
1482
1483#define DBGMCU_IDCODE_DIV_ID_Pos (12U)
1484#define DBGMCU_IDCODE_DIV_ID_Msk (0xFUL << DBGMCU_IDCODE_DIV_ID_Pos)

2388/* FLASH and Option Bytes Registers */

2391
2392/******************* Bit definition for FLASH_ACR register ******************/
2393#define FLASH_ACR_LATENCY_Pos (0U)
2394#define FLASH_ACR_LATENCY_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_ACR_LATENCY_Pos)
2395#define FLASH_ACR_LATENCY FLASH_ACR_LATENCY_Msk

2397#define FLASH_ACR_PRFTEN_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_ACR_PRFTEN_Pos)
2398#define FLASH_ACR_PRFTEN FLASH_ACR_PRFTEN_Msk

2400#define FLASH_ACR_SLEEP_PD_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_ACR_SLEEP_PD_Pos)
2401#define FLASH_ACR_SLEEP_PD FLASH_ACR_SLEEP_PD_Msk

2403#define FLASH_ACR_RUN_PD_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_ACR_RUN_PD_Pos)
2404#define FLASH_ACR_RUN_PD FLASH_ACR_RUN_PD_Msk

2407#define FLASH_ACR_DISAB_BUF FLASH_ACR_DISAB_BUF_Msk

2409#define FLASH_ACR_PRE_READ_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_ACR_PRE_READ_Pos)
2410#define FLASH_ACR_PRE_READ FLASH_ACR_PRE_READ_Msk
2411

2413#define FLASH_PECR_PELOCK_Pos (0U)
2414#define FLASH_PECR_PELOCK_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_PECR_PELOCK_Pos)
2415#define FLASH_PECR_PELOCK FLASH_PECR_PELOCK_Msk
2416#define FLASH_PECR_PRGLOCK_Pos (1U)
2417#define FLASH_PECR_PRGLOCK_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_PECR_PRGLOCK_Pos)
2418#define FLASH_PECR_PRGLOCK FLASH_PECR_PRGLOCK_Msk

2420#define FLASH_PECR_OPTLOCK_Msk (0x1UL << FLASH_PECR_OPTLOCK_Pos)
2421#define FLASH_PECR_OPTLOCK FLASH_PECR_OPTLOCK_Msk

3160/* */

3318#define I2C_TIMINGR_SCLDEL I2C_TIMINGR_SCLDEL_Msk

3320#define I2C_TIMINGR_PRESC_Msk (0xFUL << I2C_TIMINGR_PRESC_Pos)
3321#define I2C_TIMINGR_PRESC I2C_TIMINGR_PRESC_Msk
3322
3323/******************* Bit definition for I2C_TIMEOUTR register *******************/
3324#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTA_Pos (0U)
3325#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTA_Msk (0xFFFUL << I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTA_Pos)
3326#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTA I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTA_Msk
3327#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIDLE_Pos (12U)
3328#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIDLE_Msk (0x1UL << I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIDLE_Pos)
3329#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIDLE I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIDLE_Msk
3330#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMOUTEN_Pos (15U)
3331#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMOUTEN_Msk (0x1UL << I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMOUTEN_Pos)
3332#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMOUTEN I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMOUTEN_Msk
3333#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTB_Pos (16U)
3334#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTB_Msk (0xFFFUL << I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTB_Pos)
3335#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTB I2C_TIMEOUTR_TIMEOUTB_Msk
3336#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TEXTEN_Pos (31U)
3337#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TEXTEN_Msk (0x1UL << I2C_TIMEOUTR_TEXTEN_Pos)
3338#define I2C_TIMEOUTR_TEXTEN I2C_TIMEOUTR_TEXTEN_Msk

3341#define I2C_ISR_TXE_Pos (0U)
3342#define I2C_ISR_TXE_Msk (0x1UL << I2C_ISR_TXE_Pos)
3343#define I2C_ISR_TXE I2C_ISR_TXE_Msk

3345#define I2C_ISR_TXIS_Msk (0x1UL << I2C_ISR_TXIS_Pos)
3346#define I2C_ISR_TXIS I2C_ISR_TXIS_Msk

3349#define I2C_ISR_RXNE I2C_ISR_RXNE_Msk

3361#define I2C_ISR_TC I2C_ISR_TC_Msk

3364#define I2C_ISR_TCR I2C_ISR_TCR_Msk

3367#define I2C_ISR_BERR I2C_ISR_BERR_Msk

3370#define I2C_ISR_ARLO I2C_ISR_ARLO_Msk

3372#define I2C_ISR_OVR_Msk (0x1UL << I2C_ISR_OVR_Pos)
3373#define I2C_ISR_OVR I2C_ISR_OVR_Msk

3376#define I2C_ISR_PECERR I2C_ISR_PECERR_Msk

3382#define I2C_ISR_ALERT I2C_ISR_ALERT_Msk

3385#define I2C_ISR_BUSY I2C_ISR_BUSY_Msk

3388#define I2C_ISR_DIR I2C_ISR_DIR_Msk

3391#define I2C_ISR_ADDCODE I2C_ISR_ADDCODE_Msk

3411#define I2C_ICR_OVRCF I2C_ICR_OVRCF_Msk

3414#define I2C_ICR_PECCF I2C_ICR_PECCF_Msk

3420#define I2C_ICR_ALERTCF I2C_ICR_ALERTCF_Msk

3437/******************************************************************************/
3438/* */

3440/* */

3442/******************* Bit definition for IWDG_KR register ********************/

3444#define IWDG_KR_KEY_Msk (0xFFFFUL << IWDG_KR_KEY_Pos)
3445#define IWDG_KR_KEY IWDG_KR_KEY_Msk
3446
3447/******************* Bit definition for IWDG_PR register ********************/
3448#define IWDG_PR_PR_Pos (0U)
3449#define IWDG_PR_PR_Msk (0x7UL << IWDG_PR_PR_Pos)
3450#define IWDG_PR_PR IWDG_PR_PR_Msk
3451#define IWDG_PR_PR_0 (0x1UL << IWDG_PR_PR_Pos)
3452#define IWDG_PR_PR_1 (0x2UL << IWDG_PR_PR_Pos)
3453#define IWDG_PR_PR_2 (0x4UL << IWDG_PR_PR_Pos)
3454

3457#define IWDG_RLR_RL_Msk (0xFFFUL << IWDG_RLR_RL_Pos)
3458#define IWDG_RLR_RL IWDG_RLR_RL_Msk
3459
3460/******************* Bit definition for IWDG_SR register ********************/
3461#define IWDG_SR_PVU_Pos (0U)
3462#define IWDG_SR_PVU_Msk (0x1UL << IWDG_SR_PVU_Pos)
3463#define IWDG_SR_PVU IWDG_SR_PVU_Msk
3464#define IWDG_SR_RVU_Pos (1U)
3465#define IWDG_SR_RVU_Msk (0x1UL << IWDG_SR_RVU_Pos)
3466#define IWDG_SR_RVU IWDG_SR_RVU_Msk
3467#define IWDG_SR_WVU_Pos (2U)
3468#define IWDG_SR_WVU_Msk (0x1UL << IWDG_SR_WVU_Pos)
3469#define IWDG_SR_WVU IWDG_SR_WVU_Msk
3470
3471/******************* Bit definition for IWDG_KR register ********************/

3473#define IWDG_WINR_WIN_Msk (0xFFFUL << IWDG_WINR_WIN_Pos)
3474#define IWDG_WINR_WIN IWDG_WINR_WIN_Msk

3489

3496
3497#define LCD_CR_BIAS_Pos (5U)

3505#define LCD_CR_MUX_SEG LCD_CR_MUX_SEG_Msk
3506
3507#define LCD_CR_BUFEN_Pos (8U)

3509#define LCD_CR_BUFEN LCD_CR_BUFEN_Msk

3513#define LCD_FCR_HD_Msk (0x1UL << LCD_FCR_HD_Pos)
3514#define LCD_FCR_HD LCD_FCR_HD_Msk

3517#define LCD_FCR_SOFIE LCD_FCR_SOFIE_Msk

3520#define LCD_FCR_UDDIE LCD_FCR_UDDIE_Msk
3521

3528

3531#define LCD_FCR_DEAD LCD_FCR_DEAD_Msk

3533#define LCD_FCR_DEAD_1 (0x2UL << LCD_FCR_DEAD_Pos)
3534#define LCD_FCR_DEAD_2 (0x4UL << LCD_FCR_DEAD_Pos)
3535

3537#define LCD_FCR_CC_Msk (0x7UL << LCD_FCR_CC_Pos)
3538#define LCD_FCR_CC LCD_FCR_CC_Msk

3568#define LCD_SR_SOF_Msk (0x1UL << LCD_SR_SOF_Pos)

3572#define LCD_SR_UDR LCD_SR_UDR_Msk

3575#define LCD_SR_UDD LCD_SR_UDD_Msk

3578#define LCD_SR_RDY LCD_SR_RDY_Msk

3581#define LCD_SR_FCRSR LCD_SR_FCRSR_Msk

3589#define LCD_CLR_UDDC LCD_CLR_UDDC_Msk

3596/******************************************************************************/
3597/* */
3598/* Low Power Timer (LPTTIM) */
3599/* */
3600/******************************************************************************/
3601/****************** Bit definition for LPTIM_ISR register *******************/
3602#define LPTIM_ISR_CMPM_Pos (0U)
3603#define LPTIM_ISR_CMPM_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ISR_CMPM_Pos)
3604#define LPTIM_ISR_CMPM LPTIM_ISR_CMPM_Msk

3606#define LPTIM_ISR_ARRM_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ISR_ARRM_Pos)
3607#define LPTIM_ISR_ARRM LPTIM_ISR_ARRM_Msk

3609#define LPTIM_ISR_EXTTRIG_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ISR_EXTTRIG_Pos)
3610#define LPTIM_ISR_EXTTRIG LPTIM_ISR_EXTTRIG_Msk

3612#define LPTIM_ISR_CMPOK_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ISR_CMPOK_Pos)
3613#define LPTIM_ISR_CMPOK LPTIM_ISR_CMPOK_Msk
3614#define LPTIM_ISR_ARROK_Pos (4U)
3615#define LPTIM_ISR_ARROK_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ISR_ARROK_Pos)
3616#define LPTIM_ISR_ARROK LPTIM_ISR_ARROK_Msk
3617#define LPTIM_ISR_UP_Pos (5U)
3618#define LPTIM_ISR_UP_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ISR_UP_Pos)
3619#define LPTIM_ISR_UP LPTIM_ISR_UP_Msk
3620#define LPTIM_ISR_DOWN_Pos (6U)
3621#define LPTIM_ISR_DOWN_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ISR_DOWN_Pos)
3622#define LPTIM_ISR_DOWN LPTIM_ISR_DOWN_Msk
3623

3625#define LPTIM_ICR_CMPMCF_Pos (0U)
3626#define LPTIM_ICR_CMPMCF_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ICR_CMPMCF_Pos)
3627#define LPTIM_ICR_CMPMCF LPTIM_ICR_CMPMCF_Msk

3630#define LPTIM_ICR_ARRMCF LPTIM_ICR_ARRMCF_Msk

3633#define LPTIM_ICR_EXTTRIGCF LPTIM_ICR_EXTTRIGCF_Msk
3634#define LPTIM_ICR_CMPOKCF_Pos (3U)
3635#define LPTIM_ICR_CMPOKCF_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ICR_CMPOKCF_Pos)
3636#define LPTIM_ICR_CMPOKCF LPTIM_ICR_CMPOKCF_Msk
3637#define LPTIM_ICR_ARROKCF_Pos (4U)
3638#define LPTIM_ICR_ARROKCF_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ICR_ARROKCF_Pos)
3639#define LPTIM_ICR_ARROKCF LPTIM_ICR_ARROKCF_Msk
3640#define LPTIM_ICR_UPCF_Pos (5U)
3641#define LPTIM_ICR_UPCF_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ICR_UPCF_Pos)
3642#define LPTIM_ICR_UPCF LPTIM_ICR_UPCF_Msk
3643#define LPTIM_ICR_DOWNCF_Pos (6U)
3644#define LPTIM_ICR_DOWNCF_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_ICR_DOWNCF_Pos)
3645#define LPTIM_ICR_DOWNCF LPTIM_ICR_DOWNCF_Msk

3648#define LPTIM_IER_CMPMIE_Pos (0U)
3649#define LPTIM_IER_CMPMIE_Msk (0x1UL << LPTIM_IER_CMPMIE_Pos)

3653#define LPTIM_IER_ARRMIE LPTIM_IER_ARRMIE_Msk

5506 * @brief Specific device feature definitions (not present on all devices in the STM32L0 family)

7015/******************************************************************************/
7016/* */
7017/* Universal Synchronous Asynchronous Receiver Transmitter (USART) */
7018/* */
7019/******************************************************************************/
7020
7021/*
7022 * @brief Specific device feature definitions (not present on all devices in the STM32L0 family)
7023 */
7024/* Note: No specific macro feature on this device */
7025

7380
7381/******************* Bit definition for USART_RDR register ******************/
7382#define USART_RDR_RDR_Pos (0U)
7383#define USART_RDR_RDR_Msk (0x1FFUL << USART_RDR_RDR_Pos)
7384#define USART_RDR_RDR USART_RDR_RDR_Msk
7385
7386/******************* Bit definition for USART_TDR register ******************/
7387#define USART_TDR_TDR_Pos (0U)

7390
7391/******************************************************************************/
7392/* */
7393/* USB Device General registers */
7394/* */
7395/******************************************************************************/
7396#define USB_BASE (0x40005C00U)
7397#define USB_PMAADDR_Pos (13U)
7398#define USB_PMAADDR_Msk (0x20003UL << USB_PMAADDR_Pos)
7399#define USB_PMAADDR USB_PMAADDR_Msk
7400
7401#define USB_CNTR (USB_BASE + 0x40)
7402#define USB_ISTR (USB_BASE + 0x44)
7403#define USB_FNR (USB_BASE + 0x48)
7404#define USB_DADDR (USB_BASE + 0x4C)
7405#define USB_BTABLE (USB_BASE + 0x50)
7406#define USB_LPMCSR (USB_BASE + 0x54)
7407#define USB_BCDR (USB_BASE + 0x58)
7408
7409/**************************** ISTR interrupt events *************************/
7410#define USB_ISTR_CTR ((uint16_t)0x8000U)
7411#define USB_ISTR_PMAOVR ((uint16_t)0x4000U)
7412#define USB_ISTR_ERR ((uint16_t)0x2000U)
7413#define USB_ISTR_WKUP ((uint16_t)0x1000U)
7414#define USB_ISTR_SUSP ((uint16_t)0x0800U)
7415#define USB_ISTR_RESET ((uint16_t)0x0400U)
7416#define USB_ISTR_SOF ((uint16_t)0x0200U)
7417#define USB_ISTR_ESOF ((uint16_t)0x0100U)
7418#define USB_ISTR_L1REQ ((uint16_t)0x0080U)
7419#define USB_ISTR_DIR ((uint16_t)0x0010U)
7420#define USB_ISTR_EP_ID ((uint16_t)0x000FU)
7421
7422#define USB_CLR_CTR (~USB_ISTR_CTR)
7423#define USB_CLR_PMAOVR (~USB_ISTR_PMAOVR)
7424#define USB_CLR_ERR (~USB_ISTR_ERR)
7425#define USB_CLR_WKUP (~USB_ISTR_WKUP)
7426#define USB_CLR_SUSP (~USB_ISTR_SUSP)
7427#define USB_CLR_RESET (~USB_ISTR_RESET)
7428#define USB_CLR_SOF (~USB_ISTR_SOF)
7429#define USB_CLR_ESOF (~USB_ISTR_ESOF)
7430#define USB_CLR_L1REQ (~USB_ISTR_L1REQ)
7431/************************* CNTR control register bits definitions ***********/
7432#define USB_CNTR_CTRM ((uint16_t)0x8000U)
7433#define USB_CNTR_PMAOVRM ((uint16_t)0x4000U)
7434#define USB_CNTR_ERRM ((uint16_t)0x2000U)
7435#define USB_CNTR_WKUPM ((uint16_t)0x1000U)
7436#define USB_CNTR_SUSPM ((uint16_t)0x0800U)
7437#define USB_CNTR_RESETM ((uint16_t)0x0400U)
7438#define USB_CNTR_SOFM ((uint16_t)0x0200U)
7439#define USB_CNTR_ESOFM ((uint16_t)0x0100U)
7440#define USB_CNTR_L1REQM ((uint16_t)0x0080U)
7441#define USB_CNTR_L1RESUME ((uint16_t)0x0020U)
7442#define USB_CNTR_RESUME ((uint16_t)0x0010U)
7443#define USB_CNTR_FSUSP ((uint16_t)0x0008U)
7444#define USB_CNTR_LPMODE ((uint16_t)0x0004U)
7445#define USB_CNTR_PDWN ((uint16_t)0x0002U)
7446#define USB_CNTR_FRES ((uint16_t)0x0001U)
7447/************************* BCDR control register bits definitions ***********/
7448#define USB_BCDR_DPPU ((uint16_t)0x8000U)
7449#define USB_BCDR_PS2DET ((uint16_t)0x0080U)
7450#define USB_BCDR_SDET ((uint16_t)0x0040U)
7451#define USB_BCDR_PDET ((uint16_t)0x0020U)
7452#define USB_BCDR_DCDET ((uint16_t)0x0010U)
7453#define USB_BCDR_SDEN ((uint16_t)0x0008U)
7454#define USB_BCDR_PDEN ((uint16_t)0x0004U)
7455#define USB_BCDR_DCDEN ((uint16_t)0x0002U)
7456#define USB_BCDR_BCDEN ((uint16_t)0x0001U)
7457/*************************** LPM register bits definitions ******************/
7458#define USB_LPMCSR_BESL ((uint16_t)0x00F0U)
7459#define USB_LPMCSR_REMWAKE ((uint16_t)0x0008U)
7460#define USB_LPMCSR_LPMACK ((uint16_t)0x0002U)
7461#define USB_LPMCSR_LMPEN ((uint16_t)0x0001U)
7462/******************** FNR Frame Number Register bit definitions ************/
7463#define USB_FNR_RXDP ((uint16_t)0x8000U)
7464#define USB_FNR_RXDM ((uint16_t)0x4000U)
7465#define USB_FNR_LCK ((uint16_t)0x2000U)
7466#define USB_FNR_LSOF ((uint16_t)0x1800U)
7467#define USB_FNR_FN ((uint16_t)0x07FFU)
7468/******************** DADDR Device ADDRess bit definitions ****************/
7469#define USB_DADDR_EF ((uint8_t)0x80U)
7470#define USB_DADDR_ADD ((uint8_t)0x7FU)
7471/****************************** Endpoint register *************************/
7472#define USB_EP0R USB_BASE
7473#define USB_EP1R (USB_BASE + 0x04)
7474#define USB_EP2R (USB_BASE + 0x08)
7475#define USB_EP3R (USB_BASE + 0x0C)
7476#define USB_EP4R (USB_BASE + 0x10)
7477#define USB_EP5R (USB_BASE + 0x14)
7478#define USB_EP6R (USB_BASE + 0x18)
7479#define USB_EP7R (USB_BASE + 0x1C)
7480/* bit positions */
7481#define USB_EP_CTR_RX ((uint16_t)0x8000U)
7482#define USB_EP_DTOG_RX ((uint16_t)0x4000U)
7483#define USB_EPRX_STAT ((uint16_t)0x3000U)
7484#define USB_EP_SETUP ((uint16_t)0x0800U)
7485#define USB_EP_T_FIELD ((uint16_t)0x0600U)
7486#define USB_EP_KIND ((uint16_t)0x0100U)
7487#define USB_EP_CTR_TX ((uint16_t)0x0080U)
7488#define USB_EP_DTOG_TX ((uint16_t)0x0040U)
7489#define USB_EPTX_STAT ((uint16_t)0x0030U)
7490#define USB_EPADDR_FIELD ((uint16_t)0x000FU)
7491
7492/* EndPoint REGister MASK (no toggle fields) */
7493#define USB_EPREG_MASK (USB_EP_CTR_RX|USB_EP_SETUP|USB_EP_T_FIELD|USB_EP_KIND|USB_EP_CTR_TX|USB_EPADDR_FIELD)
7495#define USB_EP_TYPE_MASK ((uint16_t)0x0600U)
7496#define USB_EP_BULK ((uint16_t)0x0000U)
7497#define USB_EP_CONTROL ((uint16_t)0x0200U)
7498#define USB_EP_ISOCHRONOUS ((uint16_t)0x0400U)
7499#define USB_EP_INTERRUPT ((uint16_t)0x0600U)
7500#define USB_EP_T_MASK ((uint16_t) ~USB_EP_T_FIELD & USB_EPREG_MASK)
7501
7502#define USB_EPKIND_MASK ((uint16_t)~USB_EP_KIND & USB_EPREG_MASK)
7504#define USB_EP_TX_DIS ((uint16_t)0x0000U)
7505#define USB_EP_TX_STALL ((uint16_t)0x0010U)
7506#define USB_EP_TX_NAK ((uint16_t)0x0020U)
7507#define USB_EP_TX_VALID ((uint16_t)0x0030U)
7508#define USB_EPTX_DTOG1 ((uint16_t)0x0010U)
7509#define USB_EPTX_DTOG2 ((uint16_t)0x0020U)
7510#define USB_EPTX_DTOGMASK (USB_EPTX_STAT|USB_EPREG_MASK)
7512#define USB_EP_RX_DIS ((uint16_t)0x0000U)
7513#define USB_EP_RX_STALL ((uint16_t)0x1000U)
7514#define USB_EP_RX_NAK ((uint16_t)0x2000U)
7515#define USB_EP_RX_VALID ((uint16_t)0x3000U)
7516#define USB_EPRX_DTOG1 ((uint16_t)0x1000U)
7517#define USB_EPRX_DTOG2 ((uint16_t)0x2000U)
7518#define USB_EPRX_DTOGMASK (USB_EPRX_STAT|USB_EPREG_MASK)
7519
7520/******************************************************************************/
7521/* */
7522/* Window WATCHDOG (WWDG) */
7523/* */
7524/******************************************************************************/
7525
7526/******************* Bit definition for WWDG_CR register ********************/
7527#define WWDG_CR_T_Pos (0U)
7528#define WWDG_CR_T_Msk (0x7FUL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7529#define WWDG_CR_T WWDG_CR_T_Msk
7530#define WWDG_CR_T_0 (0x01UL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7531#define WWDG_CR_T_1 (0x02UL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7532#define WWDG_CR_T_2 (0x04UL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7533#define WWDG_CR_T_3 (0x08UL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7534#define WWDG_CR_T_4 (0x10UL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7535#define WWDG_CR_T_5 (0x20UL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7536#define WWDG_CR_T_6 (0x40UL << WWDG_CR_T_Pos)
7537
7538/* Legacy defines */
7539#define WWDG_CR_T0 WWDG_CR_T_0
7540#define WWDG_CR_T1 WWDG_CR_T_1
7541#define WWDG_CR_T2 WWDG_CR_T_2
7542#define WWDG_CR_T3 WWDG_CR_T_3
7543#define WWDG_CR_T4 WWDG_CR_T_4
7544#define WWDG_CR_T5 WWDG_CR_T_5
7545#define WWDG_CR_T6 WWDG_CR_T_6
7546
7547#define WWDG_CR_WDGA_Pos (7U)
7548#define WWDG_CR_WDGA_Msk (0x1UL << WWDG_CR_WDGA_Pos)
7549#define WWDG_CR_WDGA WWDG_CR_WDGA_Msk
7550
7551/******************* Bit definition for WWDG_CFR register *******************/
7552#define WWDG_CFR_W_Pos (0U)
7553#define WWDG_CFR_W_Msk (0x7FUL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7554#define WWDG_CFR_W WWDG_CFR_W_Msk
7555#define WWDG_CFR_W_0 (0x01UL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7556#define WWDG_CFR_W_1 (0x02UL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7557#define WWDG_CFR_W_2 (0x04UL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7558#define WWDG_CFR_W_3 (0x08UL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7559#define WWDG_CFR_W_4 (0x10UL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7560#define WWDG_CFR_W_5 (0x20UL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7561#define WWDG_CFR_W_6 (0x40UL << WWDG_CFR_W_Pos)
7562
7563/* Legacy defines */
7564#define WWDG_CFR_W0 WWDG_CFR_W_0
7565#define WWDG_CFR_W1 WWDG_CFR_W_1
7566#define WWDG_CFR_W2 WWDG_CFR_W_2
7567#define WWDG_CFR_W3 WWDG_CFR_W_3
7568#define WWDG_CFR_W4 WWDG_CFR_W_4
7569#define WWDG_CFR_W5 WWDG_CFR_W_5
7570#define WWDG_CFR_W6 WWDG_CFR_W_6
7571
7572#define WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_Pos (7U)
7573#define WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_Msk (0x3UL << WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_Pos)
7574#define WWDG_CFR_WDGTB WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_Msk
7575#define WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_0 (0x1UL << WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_Pos)
7576#define WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_1 (0x2UL << WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_Pos)
7577
7578/* Legacy defines */
7579#define WWDG_CFR_WDGTB0 WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_0
7580#define WWDG_CFR_WDGTB1 WWDG_CFR_WDGTB_1
7581
7582#define WWDG_CFR_EWI_Pos (9U)
7583#define WWDG_CFR_EWI_Msk (0x1UL << WWDG_CFR_EWI_Pos)
7584#define WWDG_CFR_EWI WWDG_CFR_EWI_Msk
7585
7586/******************* Bit definition for WWDG_SR register ********************/
7587#define WWDG_SR_EWIF_Pos (0U)
7588#define WWDG_SR_EWIF_Msk (0x1UL << WWDG_SR_EWIF_Pos)
7589#define WWDG_SR_EWIF WWDG_SR_EWIF_Msk
7590
7594
7598
7602
7603/******************************* ADC Instances ********************************/
7604#define IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == ADC1)
7605#define IS_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == ADC1_COMMON)
7606
7607/******************************* COMP Instances *******************************/
7608#define IS_COMP_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == COMP1) || \
7609 ((INSTANCE) == COMP2))
7610
7611#define IS_COMP_COMMON_INSTANCE(COMMON_INSTANCE) ((COMMON_INSTANCE) == COMP12_COMMON)
7612
7613/******************************* CRC Instances ********************************/
7614#define IS_CRC_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == CRC)
7615
7616/******************************* DAC Instances *********************************/
7617#define IS_DAC_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == DAC)
7618
7619/******************************* DMA Instances *********************************/
7620#define IS_DMA_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == DMA1_Channel1) || \
7621 ((INSTANCE) == DMA1_Channel2) || \
7622 ((INSTANCE) == DMA1_Channel3) || \
7623 ((INSTANCE) == DMA1_Channel4) || \
7624 ((INSTANCE) == DMA1_Channel5) || \
7625 ((INSTANCE) == DMA1_Channel6) || \
7626 ((INSTANCE) == DMA1_Channel7))
7627
7628/******************************* GPIO Instances *******************************/
7629#define IS_GPIO_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == GPIOA) || \
7630 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOB) || \
7631 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOC) || \
7632 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOD) || \
7633 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOE) || \
7634 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOH))
7635
7636#define IS_GPIO_AF_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == GPIOA) || \
7637 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOB) || \
7638 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOC) || \
7639 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOD) || \
7640 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOE) || \
7641 ((INSTANCE) == GPIOH))
7642
7643/******************************** I2C Instances *******************************/
7644#define IS_I2C_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == I2C1) || \
7645 ((INSTANCE) == I2C2) || \
7646 ((INSTANCE) == I2C3))
7647
7648/****************** I2C Instances : wakeup capability from stop modes *********/
7649#define IS_I2C_WAKEUP_FROMSTOP_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == I2C1) || \
7650 ((INSTANCE) == I2C3))
7651
7652
7653/******************************** I2S Instances *******************************/
7654#define IS_I2S_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == SPI2)
7655
7656/******************************* RNG Instances ********************************/
7657#define IS_RNG_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == RNG)
7658
7659/****************************** RTC Instances *********************************/
7660#define IS_RTC_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == RTC)
7661
7662/******************************** SMBUS Instances *****************************/
7663#define IS_SMBUS_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == I2C1) || \
7664 ((INSTANCE) == I2C3))
7665
7666/******************************** SPI Instances *******************************/
7667#define IS_SPI_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == SPI1) || \
7668 ((INSTANCE) == SPI2))
7669
7670/****************** LPTIM Instances : All supported instances *****************/
7671#define IS_LPTIM_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == LPTIM1)
7672
7673/************* LPTIM instances supporting the encoder mode feature ************/
7674#define IS_LPTIM_ENCODER_INTERFACE_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == LPTIM1)
7675
7676/****************** TIM Instances : All supported instances *******************/
7677#define IS_TIM_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7678 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7679 ((INSTANCE) == TIM6) || \
7680 ((INSTANCE) == TIM7) || \
7681 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7682 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7683
7684/************* TIM Instances : at least 1 capture/compare channel *************/
7685#define IS_TIM_CC1_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7686 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7687 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7688 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7689
7690/************ TIM Instances : at least 2 capture/compare channels *************/
7691#define IS_TIM_CC2_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7692 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7693 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7694 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7695
7696/************ TIM Instances : at least 3 capture/compare channels *************/
7697#define IS_TIM_CC3_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7698 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3))
7699
7700/************ TIM Instances : at least 4 capture/compare channels *************/
7701#define IS_TIM_CC4_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7702 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3))
7703
7704/****************** TIM Instances : DMA requests generation (UDE) *************/
7705#define IS_TIM_DMA_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7706 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7707 ((INSTANCE) == TIM6) || \
7708 ((INSTANCE) == TIM7))
7709
7710/************ TIM Instances : DMA requests generation (CCxDE) *****************/
7711#define IS_TIM_DMA_CC_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7712 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3))
7713
7714/******************** TIM Instances : DMA burst feature ***********************/
7715#define IS_TIM_DMABURST_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7716 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3))
7717
7718/******************* TIM Instances : output(s) available **********************/
7719#define IS_TIM_CCX_INSTANCE(INSTANCE, CHANNEL) \
7720 (((((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7721 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3)) \
7722 && \
7723 (((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_1) || \
7724 ((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_2) || \
7725 ((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_3) || \
7726 ((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_4))) \
7727 || \
7728 (((INSTANCE) == TIM21) && \
7729 (((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_1) || \
7730 ((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_2))) \
7731 || \
7732 (((INSTANCE) == TIM22) && \
7733 (((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_1) || \
7734 ((CHANNEL) == TIM_CHANNEL_2))))
7735
7736/****************** TIM Instances : supporting clock division *****************/
7737#define IS_TIM_CLOCK_DIVISION_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7738 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7739 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7740 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7741
7742/****** TIM Instances : supporting external clock mode 1 for ETRF input *******/
7743#define IS_TIM_CLOCKSOURCE_ETRMODE1_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7744 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7745 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21))
7746
7747/****** TIM Instances : supporting external clock mode 2 for ETRF input *******/
7748#define IS_TIM_CLOCKSOURCE_ETRMODE2_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7749 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7750 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7751 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7752
7753/****************** TIM Instances : supporting external clock mode 1 for TIX inputs*/
7754#define IS_TIM_CLOCKSOURCE_TIX_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7755 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7756 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21))
7757
7758/****************** TIM Instances : supporting internal trigger inputs(ITRX) *******/
7759#define IS_TIM_CLOCKSOURCE_ITRX_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7760 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7761 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7762 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7763
7764/****************** TIM Instances : supporting counting mode selection ********/
7765#define IS_TIM_COUNTER_MODE_SELECT_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7766 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7767 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7768 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7769
7770/****************** TIM Instances : supporting encoder interface **************/
7771#define IS_TIM_ENCODER_INTERFACE_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7772 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7773 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7774 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7775
7776/***************** TIM Instances : external trigger input available ************/
7777#define IS_TIM_ETR_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7778 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7779 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7780 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7781
7782/****** TIM Instances : master mode available (TIMx_CR2.MMS available )********/
7783#define IS_TIM_MASTER_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7784 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7785 ((INSTANCE) == TIM6) || \
7786 ((INSTANCE) == TIM7) || \
7787 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7788 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7789
7790/*********** TIM Instances : Slave mode available (TIMx_SMCR available )*******/
7791#define IS_TIM_SLAVE_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7792 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7793 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7794 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7795
7796/****************** TIM Instances : remapping capability **********************/
7797#define IS_TIM_REMAP_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7798 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3) || \
7799 ((INSTANCE) == TIM21) || \
7800 ((INSTANCE) == TIM22))
7801
7802/******************* TIM Instances : output(s) OCXEC register *****************/
7803#define IS_TIM_OCXREF_CLEAR_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7804 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3))
7805
7806/******************* TIM Instances : Timer input XOR function *****************/
7807#define IS_TIM_XOR_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == TIM2) || \
7808 ((INSTANCE) == TIM3))
7809
7810/****************************** TSC Instances *********************************/
7811#define IS_TSC_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == TSC)
7812
7813/******************** UART Instances : Asynchronous mode **********************/
7814#define IS_UART_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7815 ((INSTANCE) == USART2) || \
7816 ((INSTANCE) == USART4) || \
7817 ((INSTANCE) == USART5))
7818
7819/******************** USART Instances : Synchronous mode **********************/
7820#define IS_USART_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7821 ((INSTANCE) == USART2) || \
7822 ((INSTANCE) == USART4) || \
7823 ((INSTANCE) == USART5))
7824
7825/****************** USART Instances : Auto Baud Rate detection ****************/
7826
7827#define IS_USART_AUTOBAUDRATE_DETECTION_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7828 ((INSTANCE) == USART2))
7829
7830/****************** UART Instances : Driver Enable *****************/
7831#define IS_UART_DRIVER_ENABLE_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7832 ((INSTANCE) == USART2) || \
7833 ((INSTANCE) == USART4) || \
7834 ((INSTANCE) == USART5) || \
7835 ((INSTANCE) == LPUART1))
7836
7837/******************** UART Instances : Half-Duplex mode **********************/
7838#define IS_UART_HALFDUPLEX_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7839 ((INSTANCE) == USART2) || \
7840 ((INSTANCE) == USART4) || \
7841 ((INSTANCE) == USART5) || \
7842 ((INSTANCE) == LPUART1))
7843
7844/******************** UART Instances : LIN mode **********************/
7845#define IS_UART_LIN_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7846 ((INSTANCE) == USART2))
7847
7848/******************** UART Instances : Wake-up from Stop mode **********************/
7849#define IS_UART_WAKEUP_FROMSTOP_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7850 ((INSTANCE) == USART2) || \
7851 ((INSTANCE) == LPUART1))
7852
7853/****************** UART Instances : Hardware Flow control ********************/
7854#define IS_UART_HWFLOW_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7855 ((INSTANCE) == USART2) || \
7856 ((INSTANCE) == USART4) || \
7857 ((INSTANCE) == USART5) || \
7858 ((INSTANCE) == LPUART1))
7859
7860/********************* UART Instances : Smard card mode ***********************/
7861#define IS_SMARTCARD_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7862 ((INSTANCE) == USART2))
7863
7864/*********************** UART Instances : IRDA mode ***************************/
7865#define IS_IRDA_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) (((INSTANCE) == USART1) || \
7866 ((INSTANCE) == USART2))
7867
7868/******************** LPUART Instance *****************************************/
7869#define IS_LPUART_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == LPUART1)
7870
7871/****************************** IWDG Instances ********************************/
7872#define IS_IWDG_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == IWDG)
7873
7874/******************************* USB Instances *******************************/
7875#define IS_USB_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == USB)
7876#define IS_PCD_ALL_INSTANCE IS_USB_ALL_INSTANCE
7877
7878/****************************** WWDG Instances ********************************/
7879#define IS_WWDG_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == WWDG)
7880
7881/****************************** LCD Instances ********************************/
7882#define IS_LCD_ALL_INSTANCE(INSTANCE) ((INSTANCE) == LCD)
7883
7887
7888/******************************************************************************/
7889/* For a painless codes migration between the STM32L0xx device product */
7890/* lines, the aliases defined below are put in place to overcome the */
7891/* differences in the interrupt handlers and IRQn definitions. */
7892/* No need to update developed interrupt code when moving across */
7893/* product lines within the same STM32L0 Family */
7894/******************************************************************************/
7895
7896/* Aliases for __IRQn */
7897
7898#define LPUART1_IRQn RNG_LPUART1_IRQn
7899#define AES_LPUART1_IRQn RNG_LPUART1_IRQn
7900#define AES_RNG_LPUART1_IRQn RNG_LPUART1_IRQn
7901#define TIM6_IRQn TIM6_DAC_IRQn
7902#define RCC_IRQn RCC_CRS_IRQn
7903#define DMA1_Channel4_5_IRQn DMA1_Channel4_5_6_7_IRQn
7904#define ADC1_IRQn ADC1_COMP_IRQn
7905#define SVC_IRQn SVCall_IRQn
7906
7907/* Aliases for __IRQHandler */
7908#define LPUART1_IRQHandler RNG_LPUART1_IRQHandler
7909#define AES_LPUART1_IRQHandler RNG_LPUART1_IRQHandler
7910#define AES_RNG_LPUART1_IRQHandler RNG_LPUART1_IRQHandler
7911#define TIM6_IRQHandler TIM6_DAC_IRQHandler
7912#define RCC_IRQHandler RCC_CRS_IRQHandler
7913#define DMA1_Channel4_5_IRQHandler DMA1_Channel4_5_6_7_IRQHandler
7914#define ADC1_IRQHandler ADC1_COMP_IRQHandler
7915
7919
7923
7924#ifdef __cplusplus
7925}
7926#endif /* __cplusplus */
7927
7928#endif /* __STM32L073xx_H */
7929
7930
7931
7932
__IO
#define __IO
